v0.note: Jul 19, 12:08. First deployed build. Pixel-font prototype: placeholder sprites, no toons, flat grey title. 6.6k lines of source.

v1.note: Jul 19, 22:03, ten hours later. The visual identity arrives -- vector toon cast, WebGL effects, vector props, attract mode, cast roll call, star power, synth music. Look at the TITLE SCREEN: the hub is barely touched.

v2.note: Jul 21, 00:19. Structure and story: three plug objectives per stage, relay redesigned to bank-and-spend, destructible debris, ability gauge, and the per-stage briefing screen. Look at the BRIEFING and the HUD -- the hub still looks like v1.

v3.note: Jul 22, 09:07. Last build before the environment art. Dev menu, ~2k lines of character animation, and the camera module that adds run zoom. The food court is still flat slabs here -- that is the point, it is what the live site is about to replace.
